info.name: Api.co.id - Chat Gateway API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Api.co.id Chat Gateway.

## Setup
1. Set the `base_url` variable to your API server (e.g., `http://localhost:3005`)
2. Set the `api_key` variable to your API key (get from Developers → API Keys)
3. Run "List Phone Numbers" first to get your `whatsapp_phone_number_id`

## Authentication
All requests use Bearer token authentication via the `{{api_key}}` variable.

item.name: Account
item.description: Get connected accounts and phone numbers.

request.description: Retrieve all WhatsApp phone numbers connected to your account. The primary number's ID is automatically saved to `whatsapp_phone_number_id` variable.
Retrieve all Instagram accounts connected to your account. First account ID is saved to `instagram_account_id`.
Retrieve all Facebook Pages (Messenger) connected to your account.

body.raw:
{
    "phone_number": "{{customer_phone}}",
    "channel": "whatsapp",
    "message_type": "text",
    "content": "Hello! This is a test message from Postman.",
    "whatsapp_phone_number_id": "{{whatsapp_phone_number_id}}"
}

request.description: Send a text message via WhatsApp. Auto-saves `message_id` and `customer_id` from response.
Send an image with optional caption. Supported: JPEG, PNG (max 5MB).
Send a document file. Supported: PDF, DOC, DOCX (max 100MB).
Send an audio file. Supported: MP3, OGG (max 16MB).
Send a video file. Supported: MP4 (max 16MB).

item.name: Templates
item.description:
List and view WhatsApp message templates.

**Important:** Templates are created and managed via the dashboard UI (Templates page). Sync templates first via the dashboard to populate the list.

To send a template via API, use the Send Message endpoint with `message_type: "template"`.

query.description: Filter: APPROVED, PENDING, REJECTED, PAUSED, DISABLED

request.description:
List all synced WhatsApp templates.

**Note:** If this returns empty, sync templates first via the dashboard (Templates → Sync button).
List only approved templates (ready to send).
List approved authentication templates (OTP, verification codes).
Get a specific template by ID. Use the `id` from the list response.

item.name: Send Templates
item.description:
Send pre-approved WhatsApp template messages.

**How to use:**
1. First, list templates via `GET /templates?status=APPROVED` to see available templates
2. Use the `template_name` and `language` from the list
3. Fill in `components` based on the template's variables (`{{1}}`, `{{2}}`, etc.)

**Template must be APPROVED by Meta before sending.**

request.description:
**Simplest template** — no variables needed.

Just provide:
- `template.name` — exact name from Meta
- `template.language.code` — language code (e.g., `en_US`, `id`)

**Tip:** Every WABA has a default `hello_world` template.

**Template with body variables** like `{{1}}`, `{{2}}`.

If your template body is:
> "Hi {{1}}, your order {{2}} is confirmed"

Then parameters are:
- `parameters[0]` → replaces `{{1}}` (e.g., customer name)
- `parameters[1]` → replaces `{{2}}` (e.g., order ID)

**Template with image header + body variables.**

Header media types:
- `image` → JPEG, PNG (max 5MB)
- `video` → MP4 (max 16MB)
- `document` → PDF, DOC (max 100MB)

Replace `image` with `video` or `document` accordingly.

**OTP / Authentication template.**

**How to create OTP template in Meta:**
1. Go to Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp Manager → Message Templates
2. Click "Create Template"
3. Category: **Authentication**
4. Body: "Your verification code is {{1}}"
5. Button: **Copy Code** or **URL** (auto-fill)
6. Submit for approval (usually approved in minutes)

**Important:**
- Replace `your_otp_template_name` with your actual template name
- Check `language.code` matches your template
- Button type depends on your template setup:
  - `sub_type: "url"` for URL button with OTP suffix
  - `sub_type: "copy_code"` for copy-to-clipboard button

**To find your template name:** Use `GET /templates?category=AUTHENTICATION&status=APPROVED`

**Marketing template with coupon/promo code button.**

The `copy_code` button lets customers tap to copy the code.

**Template with dynamic URL button.**

If your template URL is `https://example.com/track/{{1}}`, the parameter fills the `{{1}}` suffix.

The `index: 0` refers to the first button in the template.

item.name: Messages - Interactive
item.description: Send WhatsApp interactive messages (CTA URL, Reply Buttons, List Menu).

request.description: Send an interactive message with a clickable URL button.
Send a message with up to 3 quick reply buttons.
Send a list menu with sections and selectable rows.
Send a text message via Instagram. Use `instagram_username` or `customer_id` to identify the recipient.
Send an image via Instagram DM.

item.name: Messages - Messenger
item.description: Send messages via Facebook Messenger channel.

request.description: Send a text message via Facebook Messenger.
Send an image via Facebook Messenger.

item.name: Conversations
item.description: List conversations, messages, and conversation-level actions.

query.description: Cursor for pagination (customer ID from next_cursor)
Filter by channel: whatsapp, instagram, messenger

request.description:
List all conversations with last message, unread counts, and channel info. Auto-saves first `customer_id`.

Supports filtering by channel and cursor-based pagination.
List only Instagram conversations.
List only Messenger conversations.

query.description: ISO date cursor for pagination (from next_cursor)

request.description: Get all messages for a customer by their ID. Supports pagination and direction filtering.
Get all messages for a customer by their phone number.
Send typing indicator to a WhatsApp customer. Rate limit: 1 request per 3 seconds per customer.
Send typing indicator to an Instagram customer. Replace `ig_username` with the actual username.
Mark an inbound message as read and send read receipt to the customer. Only works for inbound messages.

item.name: Customers
item.description: Manage customer records, consent, blacklist status, and messaging window.

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all customers associated with your account.
Retrieve a single customer by their CUID. Returns full customer profile including tags, consent, and blacklist status.
Retrieve a single customer by their phone number. The API auto-detects whether the identifier is a CUID or phone number.
Create a new customer record. The newly created customer's ID is automatically saved to `customer_id` variable.
Update an existing customer's profile. Only provided fields are updated (partial update).
Permanently delete a customer record. This action cannot be undone.
Log a consent action for a customer. Actions: OPT_IN, OPT_OUT, UPDATE. Useful for GDPR/compliance tracking.
Toggle a customer's blacklist status. Blacklisted customers will not receive outbound messages.
Check if the 24-hour messaging window is currently active for a customer. Returns window expiry time if active.

item.name: Customer Notes
item.description: Manage notes attached to customer records.

request.description: Retrieve all notes for a specific customer, ordered by most recent first.
Add a new note to a customer record. The newly created note's ID is automatically saved to `note_id` variable.
Delete a specific note from a customer record.

item.name: Broadcast
item.description: Send bulk template messages to multiple recipients and manage broadcast jobs.

request.description: Send a broadcast template message to multiple phone numbers. The broadcast job ID is automatically saved to `broadcast_job_id` variable.

query.description: Number of broadcast jobs to return (default 10)

request.description: List all broadcast jobs with their status and delivery statistics.
Get details and delivery stats for a specific broadcast job.
Cancel a pending or in-progress broadcast job. Messages already sent cannot be recalled.

item.name: Media Upload
item.description:
Upload media files to WhatsApp (Meta) for use in messages and templates.

The returned `media_id` can be used in send message payloads. Media expires after 30 days on Meta's servers.

formdata.description: Optional: specify which phone number to upload to

request.description:
Upload an image to WhatsApp Meta servers.

Returns a `media_id` that you can use in:
- `media_url` field when sending image messages
- Template header media

**Supported:** JPEG, PNG, WebP (max 5MB)

**Media expires after 30 days.**
Upload a document (PDF, DOC, DOCX) to WhatsApp Meta servers.
Upload a video (MP4, 3GP) to WhatsApp Meta servers.
Upload an audio file (OGG, MP3, AMR) to WhatsApp Meta servers.
Check if the API is running and your authentication is valid.
